title: [Bug]: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时不兼容
description: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时，json 类型会被强行转化成 longtext 类型。
bug_features_seed: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION p_json_test() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN DECLARE jdata JSONB;
SELECT jsonb_build_object('test', region) INTO jdata FROM (SELECT NULL AS region) AS x;
key_bug_features: JSON type forced to longtext during import
